prompt_md: For each **task** on the left, pick the **approach** on the right that fits it best — deterministic automation, AI, or a hybrid of the two. Watch for the traps: exact rules and exact figures are *not* AI work.

left: Calculate the VAT on an invoice from a fixed rate
Check that an IBAN has a valid format before saving it
Show a customer their exact current account balance
Summarize a 40-page contract into five bullet points
Tag incoming free-text complaints by theme, where the themes change over time
Extract the invoice number from PDFs that arrive in many different vendor layouts
right: Deterministic: a fixed formula gives the exact amount every time — no model needed
Deterministic: a format/regex rule — exact and instant
Deterministic: a database query for the exact figure — never an AI guess
AI: open-ended summarization, the kind of language work a model does well
AI classification into a validated set of allowed labels, since the wording is fuzzy and the categories evolve
Hybrid: AI reads the varied layouts, then code validates the extracted number's format
